info.description: Retreats, workshops, corporate wellbeing, speaking engagements

date.description: Click the month name at top of the picker to jump months/years. Use the < > arrows to step one month at a time. Leave empty for evergreen items (no fixed date).

booking_url.description: Where the 'Book now' button takes people. Paste a Calendly link (e.g. https://calendly.com/anna-annalouoflondon/discovery-call) and it opens as a popup so the customer stays on your site. Other URLs (Stripe checkout, internal pages, etc.) open normally. Leave blank to hide the button.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this experience page. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely (Corporate Workshops show nothing).
